channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [PV][公开] Anime News Network Tomb Raider King Animated Series 公开 Korean-Dubbed 预告PV Ahead Streaming Debut
item.description: Show's 1st 2 episodes will stream in advance on Laftel on Saturday ― The upcoming Korean-animated adaptation of artist 3B2S, storywriter Yuns (REDICE STUDIO), original storywriter SAN.G, and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Tomb Raider King Animated Series Reveals Korean-Dubbed Trailer Ahead of Streaming Debut

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Cyborg 009: Nemesis 动画 Casts Junko Minagawa as Cyborg 001
item.description: Minagawa voices Ivan Whiskey, infant strategist of 00 Cyborgs ― The staff of Ishimori Production's Cyborg 009: Nemesis, a new anime based on Shōtarō Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 manga, announced on... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime Casts Junko Minagawa as Cyborg 001

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Multimedia Project Heavily Armed High School Girls Gets TV 动画 改编 2027
item.description: Good Smile Company announced a television anime adaptation of illustrator neco's Juuheisou-gata Joshikousei (Heavily Armed High School Girls) multimedia franchise on Friday, revealing the main staff,... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Multimedia Project 'Heavily Armed High School Girls' Gets TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
